clean_headline: City Union Bank opened five new branches on March 13, 2026, bringing total branch count to 925
raw_headline: Our Bank has opened five new Branches on March 13, 2026 and as on date the Bank has 925 Branches in total.

clean_headline: Ravindra Jadeja signed as Brand Ambassador of City Union Bank
raw_headline: Signing of Mr Ravindra Jadeja as Brand Ambassador of the Bank.
